author: potuz
content: hmm, this is worrisome, but also I find it worrisome that we are adding tests that we will skip if we don't want to clutter with non-devnet code. I think it's fine if people want to specify genesis behavior for Gloas, or this thing of duplicated PTC votes, but I don't think we should test them. Arguably the double PTC thing could be tested since it's something that *may* happen on mainnet, but still.

author: potuz

For compliance tests, here's a PR to link the compliance tests to the CL spec releases. (CL spec release will not trigger the compliance tests, but release will happen independent of the compliance test gen to not slow down release times)
